slice_policy.default_goal: Advance exactly one completed in-game week for the active persona unless a major blocker or especially high-signal audit event happens first.

next_slice: Replay Persona A from scratch in a fresh onboarding run. Complete exactly one in-game week, log it as the start of the approved replay timeline, update the phase progress docs and persona audit to note that replay mode is now authoritative, then stop.

last_run.summary: Human approved a replay-from-scratch policy for Persona A after the original persisted browser session could not be recovered.
